config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: No one can ever explain how its existence could happen without some kind more complicated explanation - either an intelligent or subconscious mechanism which would make sense to others while being ignored elsewhere for all time (no matter what other theories might say about consciousness). As we moved on toward human evolution you will notice that most researchers now believe this phenomenon must originate somewhere else than our own universe when they first started exploring them... maybe something very similar exists here! But no way does any researcher know where such bizarre anomalies arise but only through their work alone.... That's why every new project I write takes me under my breath at times!!! So before getting too philosophical let us
